utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required items in the format: 6 (destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget) → actually 7 items. Check final package presence and completeness: 1) destination: present and specific (Athens, Greece) – complete. 2) travel_dates: present and specific (July 1-5, 2024) – complete. 3) transportation: flight details with costs – has airline class, route, cost (€125), and a confirmation code – complete. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs – has hotel name, nights, total cost, confirmation – complete. 5) activities: selected activities with costs – lists three activities with dates, times, individual costs, and total – complete. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs – provides restaurant guide and €330 dining allowance – acceptable as extra service with cost – complete. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – line-item totals summed to €1,185 and under budget – complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item in the final package and match it to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: 'Athens, Greece' maps to destinations['Athens, Greece']. Transportation: 'Budget Airlines Economy Class' maps to transportation['budget_airlines']['Economy Class']. Accommodation: 'Boutique Stay Hotel Athens' corresponds to accommodation option 'Boutique Stay'. Activities list includes Rock Climbing, Scuba Diving Excursion, and City Walking Tour, each mapped to their respective activities ratings. Additional services: a gluten-free restaurant guide and dining allowance do not correspond to a specific rated service; thus, no mapping for that. Only include items that have explicit matches in the ground truth.
